title: How do I create multiple listings all at the same time?
bodyHtml:
Creating listings 1 by 1 is time consuming.

To boost your work efficiency, we’ve added a new “Batch Listing Creation” tab that will allow you to create multiple listings and add multiple new items to Back Market’s catalog all at once.

To find this new feature, log into your Back Office > “Options” > “Batch Listing Creation.”

You can choose to create a listing for an existing item in Back Market’s catalog or submit a new item for approval.

Here’s how it works:
  1. Generate the CSV file template. You’ll see detailed instructions for the fields that you must fill in to create accurate listings.
  2. Download the CSV file.
  3. Enter your listing details in the correct file fields.
  4. Upload the final CSV file on the “Listings” page.
